title: Silk Touch Farmland│精準採集耕地
description: It can be obtained by breaking the farmland with a shovel with Silk Touch.│可以透過使用帶有精準採集附魔的鏟子破壞耕田來獲得它。
body:
# Function│功能
Using a Silk Touch enchantment on a shovel to break a farmland will drop the farmland, otherwise it will drop dirt.│使用帶有精準採集附魔的鏟子破壞耕地之後會掉落耕地，否則掉落泥土。
